patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (DOB documented as 05/05/1952 in multiple records) with primary problems including mixed dyslipidemia and hypertension. Recent notable labs from Singing River (07/03/2023) show elevated ferritin 266.8 ng/mL, low iron 41 ug/dL, low iron saturation 15%, triglycerides 158 mg/dL, LDL 62 mg/dL, and eGFR 58 ml/min/1.73m2. Diagnoses also include postoperative and unspecified anemia and a documented diagnosis of hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (01/21/2025). A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled/performed on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Functional assessments document difficulty walking; varying documentation exists regarding smoking history. Multiple care providers are listed including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and several Piedmont specialists. Conflicts noted in DOB, legal sex entries, and smoking history across source documents.
